privileged_info_summary: Task verifies Q4 compliance data fixes in AttendHRM HR system. Four employees (EMP 108, 120, 135, 148) are seeded with invalid branch ID 99; EMP 108/120/148 must be corrected to branch 101 (London), EMP 135 to branch 102 (Norwich). Two employees have swapped departments: EMP 113 must be changed from IT (102) to Accounts (106), EMP 137 from Accounts (106) to IT (102). Five new hires from q4_new_hires.csv must be imported with correct branch and department mappings: EMP 5001-5002 to London/Accounts or Marketing, EMP 5003-5004 to Norwich/IT or Production, EMP 5005 to Dublin/Administration. Pass threshold is 70 points out of 100. All data is synthetic (demo HR dataset).
